required_fields.label: Situation / Topic
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to say? E.g.: I miss you, we had a fight, I want to say goodnight...

required_fields.label: Background
required_fields.placeholder: What happened, what was the relationship like, any details you want to add...

required_fields.label: How do you know them?
required_fields.placeholder: We go to the same school, I saw them on social media, we have a mutual friend...

required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to say? E.g.: We haven't talked in a while, we had a fight, I want to cheer you up...

required_fields.label: Situation / Topic

required_fields.placeholder: What are you apologizing for? E.g.: I broke my promise, I was late, I said something hurtful...

required_fields.placeholder: What was offered or requested? Briefly explain...

subcategories.name: Personal Photo
subcategories.description: Caption text and hashtags for a personal photo post

required_fields.label: What Does the Photo Show?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Sunset photo taken on vacation, desk while drinking coffee...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a social media content writer. Write 5 different caption drafts in {{language}} for a personal photo post on {{platform}}. Photo: {{photo_description}}. Mood: {{mood}}. Hashtag preference: {{hashtag_count}}. Country/cultural context: {{country}}. Keep each caption at an appropriate length for the platform. Return only the numbered list, nothing else.

subcategories.name: Personal Story
subcategories.description: Post text for sharing an experience, thought, or life story

required_fields.label: Story / Topic
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to share? E.g.: Something interesting happened today, something I learned in childhood...

optional_fields.label: Ending CTA (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: What do you think?, Has this happened to you?

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a social media content writer. Write 5 different post text drafts in {{language}} for a personal story post on {{platform}}. Topic: {{story_topic}}. Emotion/tone: {{emotion}}. {{call_to_action}}Country/cultural context: {{country}}. Use appropriate length and format for the platform. Return only the numbered list, nothing else.

subcategories.name: Product Promotion
subcategories.description: Social media promotional copy for a product or service

required_fields.label: Product / Service Name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Coffee shop, software app, handmade jewelry...

required_fields.label: Product Description
required_fields.placeholder: What does it do, what does it offer, what makes it different?

required_fields.label: Target Audience
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Professionals aged 25-35, parents, students...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a social media marketing expert. Write 5 different post texts in {{language}} for promoting the product/service "{{product_name}}" on {{platform}}. Product: {{product_description}}. Target audience: {{target_audience}}. {{offer}}Country/market context: {{country}}. Keep it sales-focused but natural and authentic. Return only the numbered list, nothing else.

subcategories.name: Campaign
subcategories.description: Social media campaign copy for a brand, product, or event

required_fields.label: Campaign / Event Name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Summer sale, new collection launch, pop-up event...

required_fields.label: Campaign Details
required_fields.placeholder: What's being offered, when, where, and how to participate?

required_fields.label: Target Audience
required_fields.placeholder: Who is it for?

optional_fields.label: Urgency / Deadline (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: This weekend only, limited stock...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a social media marketing expert. Write 5 different announcement/post texts in {{language}} for the "{{campaign_name}}" campaign on {{platform}}. Details: {{campaign_description}}. Target audience: {{target_audience}}. {{urgency}}Country/market context: {{country}}. Keep it attention-grabbing and action-driving. Return only the numbered list, nothing else.

subcategories.name: Sports Club
subcategories.description: Social media posts for a sports club or team

required_fields.label: Club / Team Name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Club name, local football team...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a sports club social media manager. Write 5 different post texts in {{language}} on behalf of {{club_name}} on {{platform}} for the topic of {{event}}. {{match_detail}}Country/cultural context: {{country}}. Use language that speaks to fans, is energetic, and fits the club's identity. Return only the numbered list, nothing else.

subcategories.name: Motivation
subcategories.description: Inspiring and motivational social media content

required_fields.label: Topic / Theme
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Morning routine, learning from failure, goal setting...

subcategories.prompt_template: You are a motivational content writer. Write 5 different motivational content pieces in {{language}} on the theme of {{topic}} for {{platform}}. Style: {{style}}. {{audience}}Country/cultural context: {{country}}. Keep it genuine and realistic, avoid empty clichés. Return only the numbered list, nothing else.

subcategories.name: Petition
subcategories.description: Petition drafts to submit to government agencies, municipalities, or public authorities

required_fields.label: Petition Subject
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Leave request, rights violation report, application...

required_fields.label: Situation Description
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the issue or request in detail...

required_fields.label: Expected Outcome
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to happen? E.g.: Start an investigation, refund, correction...

required_fields.label: Authority to Apply To
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Mayor's Office, Ministry of Health, Police Department...

optional_fields.label: Applicant's Role (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Citizen, tenant, student, business owner...

subcategories.prompt_template:
Based on the information below, generate 5 different petition texts in {{language}}. Each should be complete and ready to use as-is.

Recipient authority: {{authority}}
Subject: {{subject}}
Situation: {{issue_description}}
Request: {{desired_outcome}}
{{applicant_role}}Country: {{country}}

Each petition should follow this format:
- Begin with "Dear [institution/authority],"
- Include a subject line
- Include the situation and request
- End with a formal closing such as "Respectfully submitted" or equivalent
- Signature block at the bottom (Full Name / Date / Contact)

The 5 versions should be in these styles:
1. Short and clear (half page, essentials only)
2. Detailed and reasoned (all arguments, references to legal basis)
3. Firm and assertive (emphasizes rights violation, requests urgent action)
4. Diplomatic (polite but clear, open to cooperation)
5. Formal and bureaucratic (full official language, point-by-point structure)

Do not add advice, explanations, or commentary. Return only 5 usable petition texts in a numbered list.

subcategories.name: Complaint Letter
subcategories.description: Formal complaint letter drafts about a product, service, or individual

required_fields.label: Subject of Complaint
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Defective product, poor service, rights violation, noise complaint...

required_fields.label: Complaint Details
required_fields.placeholder: What happened, when, how it affected you, what evidence you have...

required_fields.label: Recipient / Party Complained About
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Company name, institution, person's role...

required_fields.label: Expected Resolution
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Refund, apology, correction, launching an investigation...

subcategories.name: Official Request
subcategories.description: Official letters requesting information, documents, or action from an institution or individual

required_fields.label: Request Subject
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Information request, document approval, appointment, permission, access rights...

required_fields.label: Reason / Justification
required_fields.placeholder: Why are you making this request? What right or need is involved?

required_fields.label: Institution / Person Being Requested
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Bank, university, government agency, company...

subcategories.prompt_template:
Based on the information below, generate 5 different official request letter texts in {{language}}. Each should be complete and ready to send as-is.

Recipient institution: {{recipient_authority}}
Request subject: {{request_subject}}
Justification: {{reason}}
{{deadline}}Country: {{country}}

Each letter should follow this format:
- Begin with "Dear [institution/official],"
- Explain what is being requested and why
- Include legal or administrative basis where applicable
- Request a timeframe for response or action
- Include a formal closing and signature block

The 5 versions should be in these styles:
1. Short and clear (states the request directly)
2. Detailed and reasoned (all arguments and basis)
3. Firm and determined (implies non-acceptance of delay or refusal)
4. Diplomatic (polite and open to cooperation)
5. Formal and bureaucratic (point-by-point, full official correspondence language)

Do not add advice, explanations, or commentary. Return only 5 usable letter texts in a numbered list.

subcategories.name: Legal Objection
subcategories.description: Formal objection and appeal petition drafts against a decision, policy, or action

required_fields.label: Subject of Objection
required_fields.placeholder: Which decision or action are you objecting to? Explain in detail...

required_fields.label: Legal Basis / Justification
required_fields.placeholder: What right was violated? What legal regulation are you basing this on?

required_fields.label: Authority Being Petitioned
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Court, appellate board, mediator, administration...

optional_fields.label: Urgency / Deadline (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: I request a stay of execution, 30-day appeal period...

subcategories.prompt_template:
Based on the information below, generate 5 different objection petition texts in {{language}}. Each should be complete and ready to use as-is.

Authority petitioned: {{authority}}
Type of objection: {{objection_type}}
Subject of objection: {{subject}}
Legal basis: {{legal_basis}}
{{urgency}}Country: {{country}}

Each petition should follow this format:
- Begin with "Dear [authority/institution],"
- Clearly identify the decision or action being objected to
- State the legal basis and justification concretely
- Specify the desired outcome (cancellation, correction, reconsideration, etc.)
- Include a formal closing and signature block

The 5 versions should be in these styles:
1. Short and clear (states the objection and request concisely)
2. Detailed and legal (all justifications, statutory articles, precedent references)
3. Firm and determined (emphasizes clear rights violation, states judicial recourse will be pursued)
4. Diplomatic (reflects confidence that the administration will recognize the error)
5. Formal and bureaucratic (point-by-point structure, full legal correspondence language)

Do not add advice, explanations, or commentary. Return only 5 usable petition texts in a numbered list.
